'''lathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kismetically|kismetically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kismetically|kismetically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lathate|lathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lathatesher|lathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lathatesherĂ«m|lathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lathatero|lathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lathateshĂ«|lathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lathateshĂ«m|lathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilathatero|gokilathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilathateshĂ«|gokilathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilathateshĂ«m|gokilathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golathankerom|golathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golathankeshĂ«|golathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golathankeshĂ«m|golathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golathankeya|golathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lathaterom|lathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lathatemu|lathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lathateya|lathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilathaterom|gokilathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilathatemu|gokilathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilathateya|gokilathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lathathate|lathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lathathatesher|lathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lathathatesherĂ«m|lathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lathathatero|lathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lathathateshĂ«|lathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lathathateshĂ«m|lathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilathathatero|gokilathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilathathateshĂ«|gokilathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilathathateshĂ«m|gokilathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golathathankerom|golathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golathathankeshĂ«|golathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golathathankeshĂ«m|golathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golathathankeya|golathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lathathaterom|lathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lathathatemu|lathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lathathateya|lathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilathathaterom|gokilathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilathathatemu|gokilathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilathathateya|gokilathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠthĂŠte|lĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠthĂŠtesher|lĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠthĂŠtero|lĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠthĂŠtero|gokilĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠthĂŠnkerom|golĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠthĂŠnkeya|golĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠthĂŠterom|lĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠthĂŠtemu|lĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠthĂŠteya|lĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠthĂŠteya|gokilĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafthafte|lafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafthaftesher|lafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafthaftesherĂ«m|lafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafthaftero|lafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafthafteshĂ«|lafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafthafteshĂ«m|lafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafthaftero|gokilafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafthafteshĂ«|gokilafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafthafteshĂ«m|gokilafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafthafnkerom|golafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafthafnkeshĂ«|golafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafthafnkeshĂ«m|golafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafthafnkeya|golafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafthafterom|lafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafthaftemu|lafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafthafteya|lafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafthafterom|gokilafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafthaftemu|gokilafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafthafteya|gokilafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
